title: NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC - 211info
text: NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC BARNES ROAD OFFICE NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides wide range of obstetric and gynecological care. Services include prenatal care, midwifery and delivery services, family planning and birth control options (including tubal ligations). Offers HPV vaccinations, menopausal and infertility treatments. 11750 SW Barnes Road Suite 300 Portland, OR 97225 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as female Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm (503) 416-9922 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 416-9922 Main phone (503) 416-9971 FAX Main phone (503) 416-9922 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts most private insurance. May be able to bill some OHP coordinated care organizations. Services not covered by insurance are at cost. Moda Beacon Insurance not accepted. DOCUMENTS: Photo ID and insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties Services: Birth Control Counseling Contraception Delivery/Childbirth Emergency Contraception HPV Immunizations Infertility Services Obstetrics/Gynecology Pap Tests Prenatal Care Sterilization * Women Women's Health Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NORTHWEST WOMEN'S CLINIC BARNES ROAD OFFICE
